Talking to Neow to get starting blessing options

events.reasoning: Enemies at 1 HP for 3 fights = free card rewards with zero damage. Best for building the deck safely in early Act 1.
Leaving Neow event to proceed to map
Leaving Neow event to proceed to map
Jaw Worm at 1 HP from Neow Lament - one Strike kills it
Checking card reward options for deck building
Flurry of Blows is top-tier common - 0 energy, returns from discard on stance change. Free damage every cycle, perfect for one-shot paradigm.
Collected card reward, moving to map
Collected card reward, moving to map
Taking Monster path (x=0) to use Neow Lament charge 2 for a free fight and card reward. Planning left-side route for 2 elites.
Cultist at 1 HP from Neow Lament - one Strike kills it

RUSHDOWN is top-tier power - draw 2 on Wrath entry. Enables massive burst turns for one-shot kills. Critical engine piece.
Moving to map to continue left-side route
Only path available. Unknown room - if combat, last Neow Lament charge handles it. Continuing left-side 2-elite route.

Playing the matching game - chance to get free cards

events.translated: Strike → Louse → Strike → Louse → End Turn
events.reasoning: Both Louse at 1 HP from Neow Lament. Strike kills each one.
Louse attacks for 5, Defend gives 5 block = zero damage taken. No attacks in hand, will kill next turn.
Louse at 1 HP, Strike kills it. Fight over.
Ambrosia enters Divinity stance - 3x damage and +3 energy. Incredible burst potion for one-shot paradigm.
Viewing card reward options
MENTAL FORTRESS is the #1 Watcher power. 4 block per stance change (6 upgraded). Converts stance cycling into passive block engine. Auto-take.
Moving to map. Have Rushdown + Mental Fortress + Flurry of Blows - engine assembling well.
Only path. Unknown room, then Rest at F6, then Elite at F7. Good route.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Gremlin Gang (4 gremlins)
FIGHT TYPE: Hallway (full block)
WIN CONDITION: Kill all 4 gremlins. Priority: Sneaky Gremlin (attacks hard), Fat Gremlin (weaken), Gremlin Wizard (charges ultimate).
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Block or kill attackers each turn. Mental Fortress + stance cycling gives passive block.
KEY CARDS: Mental Fortress (setup), Eruption (Wrath entry for burst), Vigilance (Calm exit)
POTION PLAN: Save Ambrosia for elite/boss. Should not need it here.
RISKS: Multiple enemies attacking. Intents say DEBUG so unknown. Need to setup Mental Fortress for ongoing block.

TURN 1 PLAN:
- Mental Fortress (1E) = sets up passive block engine
- Eruption on Sneaky Gremlin (2E) = enters Wrath, deals 9 damage. With Rushdown in deck, would draw 2 but Rushdown not played yet.
- Actually: Mental Fortress costs 1E, Eruption costs 2E = 3E total. That enters Wrath with no exit.
- Better: Mental Fortress (1E) + Vigilance (2E) = enter Calm, get 8 block + 4 from Mental Fortress = 12 block. Safe setup.
- Or: Mental Fortress (1E) + Strike (1E) + Strike (1E) = play power + deal 12 damage to Sneaky Gremlin (kills 14 HP? No, 6+6=12).
- Best plan: Play Mental Fortress (1E). Then Miracle (0E, +1E = 4E). Then Eruption on Sneaky Gremlin (2E, 9 dmg, enters Wrath). Then Strike on Fat Gremlin (1E, 12 dmg in Wrath). But I end in Wrath with unknown intents!
- SAFEST: Mental Fortress (1E) + Strike Sneaky (1E) + Vigilance (2E) = enter Calm. Mental Fortress triggers from entering Calm = 4 block + 8 from Vigilance = 12 block. Very safe but only 6 dmg.
- Wait, Miracle gives +1E. So: Mental Fortress (1E) + Miracle (0E, +1E) = 4E left. Eruption Sneaky (2E) = enters Wrath, 9 dmg to Sneaky (14-9=5 HP left). Then Vigilance (2E) = enters Calm. Mental Fortress triggers TWICE (once for Wrath, once for Calm) = 8 block + 8 from Vigilance = 16 block total.
- This is the best plan! Play Mental Fortress, Miracle, Eruption on Sneaky, Vigilance. End in Calm with 16 block. Take 0 damage.

MARGIN NOTE: Regret curse in deck hurts draw quality. Need to remove at shop.

events.command: play Mental Fortress; play Miracle; play Eruption 1; play Vigilance; end
events.translated: Mental Fortress → Miracle → Eruption → Sneaky Gremlin → Vigilance → End Turn
events.reasoning: Setup Mental Fortress power, then Miracle for energy, Eruption on Sneaky Gremlin entering Wrath (9 dmg), then Vigilance to enter Calm. MF triggers twice = 8 block + 8 from Vigilance = 16 block. Zero damage expected.
Kill Sneaky Gremlin (5 HP, Strike deals 12 in Wrath). Then only Fat Gremlin attacks for 8, doubled in Wrath = 16 minus 4 block = 12 damage taken. Better than 26 doubled.
Fat Gremlin attacks for 8. Two Defends = 10 block. Zero damage taken. Save energy - no attacks in hand to kill anything.

CRITICAL: Gremlin Wizard attacks for 50 next! Must kill it this turn.
Ambrosia enters Divinity (3x damage, +3 energy).
I am Weakened (75% damage).
In Divinity + Weak: Strike = 6*3*0.75 = 13 (rounded). Flurry = 4*3*0.75 = 9.
Wizard has 23 HP + 7 block = need 30 damage to kill.
2 Strikes + Flurry = 13+13+9 = 35. Kills the Wizard!
Mental Fortress triggers on Divinity entry = 4 block.
Perseverance = 5 block. Total = 9 block vs Fat Gremlin 8. Zero damage from Fat.
Plan: Use Ambrosia, play Rushdown (1E), Strike Wizard, Strike Wizard, Flurry Wizard, Perseverance, end.

events.command: play Strike 2; play Flurry of Blows 2; play Rushdown; play Perseverance; end
events.translated: Strike → Gremlin Wizard → Flurry of Blows → Gremlin Wizard → Rushdown → Perseverance → End Turn
events.reasoning: Strike (13) + Flurry (9) = 22 damage on Wizard at 17 HP. Kills it. Then Rushdown for future value, Perseverance for block.

events.command: play Defend; play Defend; play Perseverance; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Defend → Defend → Perseverance → Strike → Fat Gremlin → End Turn
events.reasoning: Block vs 4 incoming from Fat. Play all cards to minimize Regret damage (only Regret left in hand = 1 card = 1 damage). Strike on Fat to chip through block while Weak wears off next turn.
No energy left. 19 block vs 4 incoming = zero from enemies. Regret deals 2 (cards in hand). Acceptable.

events.command: play Flurry of Blows 3; play Vigilance; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Flurry of Blows → Shield Gremlin → Vigilance → Strike → Fat Gremlin → End Turn
events.reasoning: Enter Calm for safety. Vigilance gives 8 block + MF 4 = 12. Strike on Shield (6 dmg while Weak - reduces it). Flurry on Shield first (3 dmg Weak). Total block 12 vs 4 incoming = zero damage. Next turn exit Calm with +2E for burst.

events.command: play Strike 0; play Flurry of Blows 0; end
events.translated: Strike → Fat Gremlin → Flurry of Blows → Fat Gremlin → End Turn
events.reasoning: Chip damage on Fat Gremlin - Strike (4) + Flurry (3) = 7, breaks its 7 block. Next turn I exit Calm with +2E for Eruption burst to kill Fat. 12 block vs 4 incoming = zero damage.

events.command: play Defend; play Defend; play Defend; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Defend → Defend → Defend → Strike → Fat Gremlin → End Turn
events.reasoning: Play all cards to minimize Regret damage. 15 block vs 4 incoming = safe. Strike chips Fat block. Waiting for Eruption draw to burst.
No energy. 15 block vs 4 incoming = zero damage from enemies. Regret deals 2 (2 cards in hand). Acceptable.
Eruption on Fat Gremlin from Calm - enters Wrath (+2E), draws 2 from Rushdown. 9 damage breaks Fat block. Starting the burst.

events.command: play Strike 0; play Flurry of Blows 0; play Strike 3; play Defend; end
events.translated: Strike → Fat Gremlin → Flurry of Blows → Fat Gremlin → Strike → Shield Gremlin → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Kill Fat Gremlin: Strike (9) + Flurry (6) + Strike (9) = 24 vs 16 needed. Then Defend (5) + MF block (4) = 9 vs 0 incoming (only Shield remains, defending). Zero damage.

events.translated: Strike → Fat Gremlin → Strike → Shield Gremlin → End Turn
events.reasoning: Kill both remaining gremlins. Strike on Fat (9 dmg vs 8 needed = kill). Strike on Shield (9 dmg vs 2 HP = kill). Fight over.
Liquid Bronze gives 3 Thorns. Decent against multi-hit enemies but not amazing. Taking it since potion slots are empty - might help in an elite.
Viewing card reward options
SANDS OF TIME is top-tier burst for one-shot paradigm. 20 base (40 in Wrath). Retains and costs -1 each turn held. After 2 turns setup in Calm it costs 2E and deals 40 in Wrath. Perfect burst card.
Moving to map. Next stop: Rest at F6, then Elite at F7.
Rest site - will upgrade Eruption (2E to 1E). Highest priority Watcher upgrade. At 81% HP, upgrade is better than rest.
Upgrading Eruption from 2E to 1E. Most important Watcher upgrade - makes Calm loop energy positive. At 81% HP, upgrade is more valuable than rest.
Upgrading Eruption from 2E to 1E. #1 priority Watcher upgrade. Makes Calm→Wrath cycle net energy positive (+2E from Calm exit, -1E for Eruption+ = +1E net).
Confirming Eruption upgrade
Proceeding to map. Next: Elite at F7 for relic.
Elite fight for relic. At 81% HP with Eruption+ and engine pieces (Rushdown, Mental Fortress, Sands of Time, Flurry of Blows). Ready for Act 1 elite.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Sentries (3x 38 HP)
FIGHT TYPE: Hallway (full block priority, but also need kill speed to avoid Dazed flooding)
WIN CONDITION: Kill all 3 sentries. They alternate: 2 attack while 1 adds Dazed. Then they swap.
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Block attacking sentries each turn. Mental Fortress + stance cycling.
KEY CARDS: Eruption+ (1E Wrath entry), Mental Fortress, Rushdown (draw on Wrath entry)
POTION PLAN: Liquid Bronze (3 Thorns) helps vs multi-hit sentries.
RISKS: Dazed flooding draw pile. Regret curse already in deck adds to hand clog.

TURN 1 PLAN:
Sentry 0 and 2 have DEBUG intent (likely Dazed dealing). Sentry 1 has DEBUG (9) = attack for 9.
I have: Miracle (0E), Perseverance (1E), Eruption+ (1E), Regret (unplayable), Sands of Time (4E unplayable), Strike (1E).

Option A: Miracle (0E, +1E=4E) + Eruption+ on Sentry 1 (1E, enters Wrath, 9 dmg, Rushdown not in play yet) + Strike Sentry 1 (1E, 12 in Wrath) = 21 damage to Sentry 1 (38-21=17). Then Perseverance (1E) = 5 block. End in Wrath. Incoming 9 from Sentry 1, doubled in Wrath = 18. 5 block → take 13. Bad.

Option B: Perseverance (1E) + Miracle (0E, +1E=3E) + Strike Sentry 1 (1E) = 6 dmg. End turn with 5 block + Sands retains. Incoming 9 from Sentry 1. Take 4. Not great.

Option C: Miracle (0E, +1E=4E) + Eruption+ on Sentry 1 (1E, 9 dmg, enters Wrath) + Perseverance (1E, 5 block) + Strike Sentry 1 (1E, 12 dmg in Wrath). 21 damage total on Sentry 1. 5 block vs 18 incoming (9 doubled). Take 13. Too much.

Option D: Just play defensive. Perseverance (1E, 5 block) + Strike Sentry 1 (1E, 6 dmg) + Miracle (+1E) = could play another card but nothing useful. End with 5 block vs 9. Take 4. And Sands retains, reducing to 3E next time.

Actually wait - Sentry 0 and 2 are likely adding Dazed (not attacking). Only Sentry 1 attacks for 9. So incoming is only 9.

Better plan: Miracle (0E, +1E=4E). Eruption+ on Sentry 1 (1E, 9 dmg). Strike Sentry 1 (1E, 12 in Wrath) = 21 total. Perseverance (1E, 5 block). 1E left but nothing to play. End in Wrath with 5 block. Incoming 9*2=18. 5 block = take 13. Still bad.

Hmm. The key issue is ending in Wrath doubles incoming. I should NOT enter Wrath unless I can exit. I dont have Vigilance in hand.

SAFEST: Miracle (0E, +1E=4E). Strike Sentry 1 (1E, 6 dmg). Perseverance (1E, 5 block). Save 2E... but nothing else to play. End with 5 block vs 9 incoming. Take 4.

Actually Sands of Time retains and gets cheaper. Hold it. Take 4 damage this turn, setup for big burst next turn when I draw Wrath exit cards.

Plan: Miracle (+1E=4E), Strike Sentry 1 (1E=3E), Perseverance (1E=2E). End turn. 5 block vs 9. Take 4. Sands retains at 3E.

events.command: play Miracle; play Strike 1; play Perseverance; end
events.translated: Miracle → Strike → Sentry → Perseverance → End Turn
events.reasoning: Defensive turn 1 vs Sentries

events.command: play Rushdown; play Defend; play Defend; end
events.reasoning: Play Rushdown to enable draw engine for future burst turns. 2 Defends = 10 block vs 18 incoming = take 8. Engine setup is worth HP investment for faster kills going forward. Sands retains at 2E.

events.command: play Mental Fortress; play Sands of Time 1; end
events.translated: Mental Fortress → Sands of Time → Sentry → End Turn
events.reasoning: Setup Mental Fortress power + Sands of Time deals 20 to Sentry 1 (32 to 12 HP). Aggressive play to reduce Dazed flooding. Take 9 damage (44 to 35). Next turn can kill Sentry 1 with Eruption burst.
Enter Calm for 8 block + 4 MF = 12 block vs 18 incoming. Take 6. Sands retains at 1E. Next turn exit Calm with +2E = 5E for burst. Dazed cards exhaust at end of turn (ethereal).

events.command: play Sands of Time 1; play Strike 0; play Flurry of Blows 0; play Perseverance; end
events.translated: Sands of Time → Sentry → Strike → Sentry → Flurry of Blows → Sentry → Perseverance → End Turn
events.reasoning: Kill Sentry 1 with Sands of Time (20 dmg vs 12 HP). Then chip Sentry 0 with Strike (6) + Flurry (4) = 10. Perseverance for block. Sentries 0 and 2 only apply Dazed = zero damage taken!
Liquid Bronze gives 3 Thorns. Both sentries attack = 6 counter damage per turn. Helps kill them faster with hand clogged by Dazed.
Defend (5 block) + Strike Sentry 0 (6 dmg, 28 to 22). Thorns deals 3 to each attacker (6 total). 5 block vs 18 = take 13. Tight but need to push damage.
Free turn (sentries applying Dazed, not attacking). Eruption+ enters Wrath for burst damage. Rushdown draws 2. Need to kill Sentry 0 (19 HP).

events.command: play Strike 0; play Flurry of Blows 2; play Strike 2; play Defend; play Defend; end
events.translated: Strike → Sentry → Flurry of Blows → Sentry → Strike → Sentry → Defend → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Kill Sentry 0 with Strike (12 in Wrath vs 10 HP). Flurry on Sentry 2 (8 dmg). Strike Sentry 2 (12 dmg). 2 Defends. Free turn since sentries debuff only.
Only playable card. 5 block vs 18 incoming = take 13. At 16 HP, survive at 3 HP. Thorns deals 3 to sentry (15 to 12). Next turn must kill or die.
